title: Day 29 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on this sentence: 

Sentence 1 - ここから　かいじょうまで　どうやって　いきますか。= How do I get to the meeting place from here?

Sentence 2 - にっぽりから　うえのまで　ＪＲで　いって、ちかてつに　のりかえて、あさくさで　おります。

= You go from Nippori to Ueno with the JR line and change to the subway like at Ueno, and get off at Asakusa.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
